title: Data assets
subtitle: Dynamic schema · sensitive fields (structure / sequence / CDR) hidden by default, granted on demand.
dataSubtitle: Data-template records · assay / measurement data organized by template type, bindable to drug assets.

trash.desc: Deleted records under "{{name}}" stay here first. You can restore or permanently delete them.
trash.emptyHint: Deleted records appear here before permanent deletion.

typeTrash.title: Type trash
typeTrash.desc: Deleted drug asset types and data asset types stay here first. You can restore or permanently delete them.

types.title: Type management
types.manageHint: This is the type and field definition page. Return to the record list to view or enter data.
types.boundAssetHint: Bind this data template to an asset type: each record must link to a record of that asset (e.g. bind "HTS results" to "compound" so every result ties to a specific compound). Unbound lets you link any asset or none.
types.boundHint: When bound, this template's data must attach to an asset record of that type
types.fromHint: Copies the scalar fields of the chosen asset type (reference/structure fields dropped)
types.fromAssetHint: Pick an existing drug asset type to seed this data asset type with usable fields. The new data type is also bound to that asset type by default, so records can be linked by matching an asset field.
types.deleteDesc: Delete type "{{name}}"? This can't be undone. If it still has records or is bound by a data template, delete the records / unbind first.
types.seedHint: Imports the backend's preset drug-R&D asset types and data templates (exact set defined by the backend)
types.importDesc: Pick types to import into this project. System = standard drug-R&D catalog; Organization = types defined in your org (copied as project-owned types).
types.keyHint: Machine identifier (ASCII, e.g. compound) used by the API and import column matching. Leave blank to auto-generate from the name. Cannot be changed after creation.
types.keyAuto: Leave blank to auto-generate from the name
types.name: Name
types.emptyDesc: Create a custom type, or import the backend's preset drug-R&D types.

fieldBuilder.title: Fields
fieldBuilder.name: Field name
fieldBuilder.typeHint: The field's data type. Common: text / number / enum. Sequence = biological macromolecule sequence (protein/nucleic acid); Structure = upload a molecular structure file; Reference = points to a record of another asset type (paired with "reference target type").
fieldBuilder.unitHint: Only number/integer fields can select a unit. Values remain numeric; units come from the project settings unit catalog.
fieldBuilder.sensitiveHint: Fields marked sensitive (e.g. smiles, sequence) are masked from lower-privilege members by default; only Managers or specifically granted users see plaintext.
fieldBuilder.refTypeHint: Restricts this reference field to records of this asset type. E.g. an antibody's heavy chain points to "sequence", so only sequence records are listed when entering data.
fieldBuilder.empty: No fields yet. Click "Add field" to start.

entities.createFromAssetDesc: Match a batch of drug asset records by an asset field, then create one data record for each matched asset.
entities.assetRecordHint: Link an asset record in this project (required for bound templates)
entities.assetRecordMatchHint: Find and bind a concrete drug asset record by one of the asset type's fields, such as id, name, or batch number. Selecting a match also fills same-name fields in the form.
entities.assetRecordEditHint: Linked assets are not changed while editing; create a new data record to rebuild the link.
entities.assetMatchHint: Leave the match value empty to use all records of the selected asset type; enter a value to create data only for matched assets.
entities.matchValuePlaceholder: Enter a field value to filter asset records
entities.matchAllPlaceholder: Leave blank = match all, or enter a field value
entities.pickAssetTypeFirst: Select a drug asset type first
entities.fixedValuesHint: Filled fields are applied to every new record; blank same-name fields are copied from each drug asset record.
entities.bulkTooMany: More than {{count}} records matched. Narrow the match first.
entities.bulkMissingRequired: Asset "{{asset}}" cannot create a record: required field {{field}} is missing
entities.noAssetTypes: No asset types yet — create one on the Types tab or import the built-ins
entities.noTemplates: No data templates yet — create one on the Types tab
entities.empty: No entities of this type yet
entities.emptyHint: Next: add your first record (e.g. a compound), or use "Import" to bring in many at once from CSV/FASTA.

grants.title: Sensitive field grants
grants.desc: Grant a specific user visibility into a sensitive field.
grants.noSensitive: This type has no sensitive fields

relations.title: Relations
relations.noLinkedAsset: This data record is not linked to a drug asset yet
relations.linkedAssetUnavailable: The linked drug asset is unavailable or you do not have access

tree.title: Component tree
tree.desc: Nested composition expanded recursively via has_component.
tree.rootMissing: Select an entity to view its component tree

import.title: Bulk import entities
import.formatHint: CSV: the header row's column names must match field names; rows import one by one. FASTA: for sequences — specify which field to take the name from and which holds the sequence. Partial success per row; failed rows list the reason.
import.csv: CSV (header row, column names = field names)
import.nameFieldHint: FASTA record header goes into this field (default: name)
import.seqFieldHint: Sequence goes into this field (default: first sequence field)
import.contentPlaceholder: Paste CSV / FASTA text, or choose a file
import.empty: Paste content or choose a file
